sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73488" key="*(omhroke/ntrwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Ὁμηρο-κέντρων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ωνος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n73488.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">patchwork of Homeric tags,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.381</biblScope> </bibl> tit., etc.</sense> </entryFree>
